The '''hag'thyyr''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of predatory [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]] that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ebra]]. The [[Rull]] thildas used a flaming hag'thyyr holding a spear as the symbol of their clan.

{{Species-stub}}
